name: ちょこナナ
short_description: This is a single-player RPG where you can enjoy the basic elements of combat, collection, exploration, and growth. The game offers a simple experience composed of “little” elements, and the charming interactions between the cute characters are also a highlight.
detailed_description:
In this world, the cat tribe is universally disliked by all living beings.

A silver-haired woman is seeking a way to coexist with the cat tribe.

This story is about their “little adventure to realize the world they envision.

” The story is heartwarming throughout and is aimed at a wide range of players.

■ Everything is made up of small elements

This game is composed of “little” elements in every aspect.

You can enjoy small maps, small discoveries, and small stories in a short amount of time.

■ Growth System

Not only do characters have levels, but weapons and armor also have growth elements.

Especially for weapons, equipping and fighting with them will level them up just like the characters, adding more fun to the battles.

■ Collection Elements

Many treasures and animals are hidden in places that are not immediately obvious, allowing you to explore and find them.

Each map also contains materials that can be collected to craft and enhance weapons and armor.

If you have an urgent matter, please send a DM to @ArtWorkers_0511 (X account).

“Controls”

I strongly recommend using an Xbox controller. The controls for mouse and keyboard are as follows:

A, S, D, W (←↓→↑): Move character/cursor

Z, Space, Return: Investigate, Attack

X, Backspace: Cancel

Esc: Open Menu

1~3: Use Skills

Only the camera rotation uses the mouse.

supported_languages:
Japanese*, English, French
*languages with full audio support
